content.description: Resource content. Text resources arrive as strings; binary resources are base64-encoded strings; structured resources are objects (per MCP `resources/read` result shape).

mimeType.description: Content MIME type as reported by the MCP server (e.g., `'text/plain'`, `'application/json'`, `'image/png'`). Empty string if the server didn't report one.

encoding.description: How `content` (when string) is encoded. `utf-8` for text; `base64` for binary.

uri.description: Echo of the requested URI (for replay-determinism debugging).
